title: TrainingAgreementType
description: A training agreement is an implicit or explicit 'agreement' between a worker and an Employer or Contractee Organization in which said worker agrees to perform duties and responsibilities for the organization in some capacity.

id.description: Provides a unique identifier to a specific work training agreement.

inceptionDate.description: The date on which the agreement (e.g., contract) starts.

terminationDate.description: The date on which the agreement (e.g., contract) ends.

trainingDatePeriod.description: The start and end dates of a worker's work training period or duration
